webp.title: Image to WebP
webp.desc: Batch convert jpg/png images to webp. Download single image directly, or multiple images as a zip file.
webp.intro: is a modern image format developed by Google, featuring high compression and excellent quality. It supports lossy and lossless compression, transparency, and animation. Compared to JPG/PNG, WebP can significantly reduce image size, speed up website loading, and improve site performance and SEO. All major browsers support WebP. It is recommended for website use.

about.meText1: Hi, I'm the developer of this site. I love frontend and tool development — feedback is welcome!
about.blogText: This blog shares frontend development, tool-making and technical notes. Welcome to follow and leave comments.
about.toolsText: All tools on this site are free online, supporting batch processing, format conversion and multilingual features. Updates ongoing.

uppercase.desc: Paste any text into the box — it will be converted to UPPERCASE and automatically copied to your clipboard.
uppercase.placeholder: Paste text (Ctrl+V) and it will be converted to UPPERCASE...
uppercase.tip: Pasting triggers automatic conversion + copy. You can also click Copy to copy the current text.
